# ROOTS (GỐC) Prompt Files

Reusable prompt templates for common development tasks on ROOTS (landing page + family app).

## Available Prompts

| Prompt                          | Purpose                                          |
| ------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| `feature-development.prompt.md` | Add a new landing page section or app page       |
| `component-creation.prompt.md`  | Create a new UI component                        |
| `bug-fix.prompt.md`             | Investigate and fix bugs                         |
| `code-review.prompt.md`         | Review a PR or diff                              |
| `commit-message.prompt.md`      | Generate conventional commit messages            |
| `commit-short.prompt.md`        | Generate short one-line commits                  |
| `refactor-code.prompt.md`       | Refactor to match project patterns               |
| `seo-optimization.prompt.md`    | Optimize metadata and SEO                        |
| `write-tests.prompt.md`         | Write tests for hooks, utilities, API routes     |

## Usage

In Copilot Chat: attach the prompt file via **Attach → Prompt**, then describe your specific task.

## Quick Tips

- Use `feature-development` when adding a new section or app page
- Use `commit-short` for quick single-line commits
- Use `code-review` before merging a PR
- Use `write-tests` for hooks, utilities, crypto, and API routes
